items.headline: Over 1 Million HDB Households to Receive Utility and Service Charge Rebates in July
items.summary: More than one million HDB households will have U-Save utility rebates and Service and Conservancy Charge rebates credited in July as part of the government's regular support package.
items.meaning: If you own or rent an HDB flat, check your July utility bill and town council statement as the rebates will automatically reduce your costs.
items.headline_zh: 超过100万个HDB家庭将在7月收到水电和杂费回扣
items.summary_zh: 超过100万个HDB家庭将在7月收到U-Save水电回扣及市镇理事会服务与维修费回扣，属于政府定期援助配套的一部分。
items.meaning_zh: 不管是购买还是租住HDB的居民，记得留意7月的水电账单和市镇理事会通知，回扣会自动帮你扣减费用。

items.headline: Government Launches Executive Condo Land Site in Admiralty for Sale
items.summary: A land site at Admiralty Walk has been officially put up for sale to developers to build an executive condominium, adding new EC supply to the north of Singapore.
items.meaning: Buyers interested in executive condos can expect a new project to come up in Admiralty in the next few years once a developer wins the bid and completes the build.
items.headline_zh: 政府推出海军部EC地段供发展商竞标
items.summary_zh: 位于Admiralty Walk的地段已正式推出，供发展商竞标兴建executive condominium，为新加坡北部增加新EC供应。
items.meaning_zh: 有兴趣买EC的买家可以期待Admiralty一带未来几年会有新项目，待发展商中标并建好后便可推出销售。

items.headline: Punggol Executive Flat Becomes First in Estate to Top $900K, Even on a Lower Floor
items.summary: An executive HDB flat in Punggol sold for more than $900,000, a first for the estate, despite not being on a high floor. The sale sets a new price benchmark for Punggol executive flats.
items.meaning: Executive flat prices in Punggol are hitting fresh highs, a useful reference for sellers pricing their unit and buyers budgeting for resale executive flats in the area.
items.headline_zh: 榜鹅executive flat首次破$900K，低楼层也创下新高
items.summary_zh: 榜鹅一个executive HDB flat以超过$900,000成交，是该区首次突破此价位，而且还不是高楼层，为榜鹅executive flat立下了新的价格标杆。
items.meaning_zh: 榜鹅executive flat价格不断刷新高位，对于准备卖屋定价的屋主，或是想在该区买转售executive flat的买家来说，都是很有参考价值的数据。

items.headline: Singapore Construction Costs Heading Higher as Commodity Prices and Labour Shortage Bite
items.summary: A combination of rising commodity prices and a tightening labour supply is pushing construction costs higher across Singapore, with developers and contractors warning that building homes is getting more expensive.
items.meaning: Higher building costs tend to get passed on to buyers, so new home prices are more likely to stay elevated or rise further than to fall.
items.headline_zh: 原材料涨价加上劳工短缺，新加坡建筑成本持续走高
items.summary_zh: 原材料价格上涨加上劳工供应吃紧，新加坡整体建筑成本不断攀升，发展商和承包商都表示建房越来越贵。
items.meaning_zh: 建筑成本上升最终往往会转嫁给买家，因此新私宅价格更可能维持高位甚至继续上涨，而不是下跌。

items.headline: Singapore Private Condo and HDB Resale Markets Are Pulling Apart
items.summary: An NUS survey finds that the private condo market and the HDB resale market are increasingly moving independently of each other, driven by different buyer groups with different financial profiles.
items.meaning: What happens to condo prices no longer predicts where HDB prices are heading, so focus your research on the specific market you are actually buying in.
items.headline_zh: 新加坡私人condo与HDB转售市场走势越来越不同步
items.summary_zh: 新加坡国立大学的调查发现，私人condo市场与HDB转售市场的走势越来越各走各路，背后是两批财务背景不同的买家群体各自带动。
items.meaning_zh: Condo价格的走势已经不能预示HDB的方向，所以做研究时要专注于你实际要买的那个市场。

items.headline: Why the Berlayar BTO Should Include 5-Room Flats, Even at a Higher Price
items.summary: A Business Times analysis argues that offering 5-room flats in the upcoming Berlayar BTO is justified even if the price is steep, given the location and demand from families needing larger homes.
items.meaning: If you are eyeing the Berlayar BTO for a 5-room flat, expect a premium price tag but the location may well justify it for families that need the space.
items.headline_zh: 为什么Berlayar BTO应该提供5-room单位，就算价格更贵也值得
items.summary_zh: 《商业时报》的分析认为，就算定价偏高，即将推出的Berlayar BTO纳入5-room单位也是合理的，理由是地点优越，而且许多需要更大空间的家庭有这方面的需求。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你打算申请Berlayar BTO的5-room单位，预期价格会不便宜，但对于需要空间的家庭来说，这个地点应该是值得的。

items.headline: June BTO Results Reveal How Singaporeans Really Pick Their Flat
items.summary: An analysis of the June 2026 BTO ballot results uncovers patterns in how applicants ranked their preferences, including which flat types and towns drew the most competition.
items.meaning: Studying these results before your next BTO application shows you which options are oversubscribed and where you have a better chance of getting a ballot.
items.headline_zh: 6月BTO结果揭示新加坡人怎么挑组屋
items.summary_zh: 针对2026年6月BTO抽签结果的分析，揭露了申请者排列选择顺序的规律，包括哪些单位类型和地区竞争最激烈。
items.meaning_zh: 在下一次BTO申请前好好研究这些结果，你就能知道哪些选项超额认购、哪里中签机会更大。

items.headline: Singapore's Landed Home Market Has Slowed in 2026, But Sellers Still Hold the Cards
items.summary: Transaction volumes for landed homes have fallen this year, yet prices have held firm because supply is tight and owners are not under pressure to sell. Activity has cooled but prices have not.
items.meaning: If you are hunting for a landed home and expecting prices to drop because fewer deals are happening, that is unlikely as sellers can afford to wait.
items.headline_zh: 2026年新加坡有地住宅市场降温，但卖家仍占上风
items.summary_zh: 今年有地住宅的成交量有所下滑，但价格依然稳健——供应紧张，屋主也没有急着卖房的压力。市场活跃度虽然冷了，价格却没有跟着跌。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你在找有地房产，期望成交量减少就能压低价格，这种想法可能行不通——卖家完全有条件慢慢等。
